events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. Task: identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Setting heavy industrial, transformers dry-type & pad-mount. Observed field condition: missing secondary bonding jumper (SDS). Work rough-complete. Reference NEC Art 450, 250.30. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Missing secondary bonding jumper in separately derived system (SDS) is a grounding/bonding defect; safety hazard, fail. Risk high or critical? Missing bonding jumper can create shock hazard, arc fault; for industrial transformer, critical maybe. But missing secondary bonding jumper is a code violation and safety issue; risk high. Need component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80. value not asked 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. findings: missing secondary bonding jumper (SDS) between transformer secondary and equipment grounding conductor / grounding electrode; no visible bonding conductor at X0 or secondary neutral bonding point; non-compliance with NEC 250.30(A). actions: install properly sized secondary bonding jumper per engineered drawings and NEC 250.30(A); verify continuity; inspect/test before energization. rationale: NEC 250.30 requires separately derived systems to have grounded conductor bonded to supply-side bonding jumper and grounding electrode; missing jumper leaves system ungrounded, shock/fire risk. references: NEC Art. 450, NEC 250.30. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

  ],
  "rationale": "A separately derived system transformer must have the secondary grounded conductor bonded to the supply-side bonding jumper and grounding electrode conductor per NEC 250.30. The missing bonding jumper leaves the system without a proper ground-fault current path, creating shock and fire hazards.",

  ]
